mapper.select:
select m_user.user_id, m_user.password, m_user.user_name, m_user.birthday, m_user.age, m_user.gender, m_user.department_id, m_user.role, m_department.department_id, m_department.department_name from m_user left join m_department on m_user.department_id = m_department.department_id
m_user.user_id like '%' || #{userId} || '%'
and m_user.user_name like '%' || #{userName} || '%'

select m_user.user_id, m_user.password, m_user.user_name, m_user.birthday, m_user.age, m_user.gender, m_user.role, m_department.department_id, m_department.department_name from m_user left join m_department on m_user.department_id = m_department.department_id where m_user.user_id = #{userId}

select m_user.user_id, m_user.password, m_user.user_name, m_user.birthday, m_user.age, m_user.gender, m_user.department_id, m_user.role, m_department.department_id, m_department.department_name from m_user left join m_department on m_user.department_id = m_department.department_id where m_user.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM m_user WHERE role = 'ROLE_ADMIN' LIMIT 1
